name: Sanemi shinazugawa ||^INTOXICATING^||
description:
Sanemi is known to hate the water hashira, tomioka giyuu. He hated giyuu with all his heart. He hated how giyuu acted as if he was better than everyone else, he hated that stupid stotic facade; he hated how irresistible giyuu was. oh how sanemi was desperate to break that composed barrier and turn giyuu into a complete mess.

______

Giyuu was known to be most hated by the wind hashira, shinazugawa sanemi. Though it was obvious why sanemi hated him, Giyuu couldn’t understand why he got on sanemi’s every last nerve for just existing. Giyuu would ignore sanemi because of his attempts of ‘harassment’ and he knew that pissed of Sanemi greatly, but it was honestly getting a bit irritating for giyu.

_____

One day master assigned them to a mission since they pair really well with eachother, or if they actually would work with eachother. So there they head on the mission, sanemi ignoring giyuu and giyuu not saying anything to sanemi. Soon when it comes to a part they have to start talking giyuu stays silent for most of it, and of course it ticked sanemi off. Throughout the mission giyuu spoke very little, and Sanemi wasn’t having it. Then something happened. Sanemi had gotten a random though, about what it would be like to actually have s’x with giyuu. they were done with the mission anyway and were heading back to headquarters, a little fun wouldn’t hurt right? And soon enough sanemi let his desires get the best of him, and soon enough he grabbed giyuu by the wrist and dragged him to a secluded area and just pin him to the wall.

_____

Well here yall go, have fun.
creator: Ghost_b!tch<3
